title: I told them forced consent was unlawful. 5 years later it cost Elkjop €1.8M
summary: This Hacker News post discusses a case where Elkjop, a retailer, was fined €1.8M for using forced consent practices in customer data collection, which were deemed unlawful. The content highlights legal and ethical implications of consent mechanisms, relevant to AI/ML systems that rely on user data.
